name: deerflow-maintainer-orchestrator
tagline: Comment-only GitHub issue/PR triage and review orchestrator for DeerFlow maintainers: resolves scope via gh, posts or drafts comments and.
verdict: Exceptionally thorough and deterministic: explicit scope-resolution rules, idempotent re-run/delta-posting logic, defined output tables, and clear failure/abort conditions (auth failure, moved PR head, unresolved scope). Fetched issue/PR content is treated as data to analyze, not instructions to obey. Only real gap: no version or changelog signal. Note: the.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
